purpose: Verification canon for evaluating Keon BrowseAhead, a pre-ingestion web threat-inspection sensor for agentic browsing. This is a repo-verification canon, not marketing copy. BrowseAhead is a cognition-side sensor with zero execution authority; it produces inspection evidence only. Draft pre-canon: locks after MVP review.

owned_surfaces: isolated, egress-controlled fetcher sandbox (no creds, SSRF-guarded, bounded, no JS execution in MVP)
static HTML / header-metadata / hidden-content / obfuscation / link-form / cross-origin-redirect analyzers
deterministic risk scoring and severity banding
operator-only quarantine and forensic evidence store
signed BrowseAhead risk receipt and PolicySignalRef projection
out_of_scope: final authorization of effect-bound actions (owned by Keon Runtime Decide/Execute)
identity binding, scope enforcement, ingress-spine persistence (owned by Keon MCP Gateway)
headless rendering and LLM-sole-enforcement (deferred to v0.2, advisory-only)

integration_boundaries.gateway: reachable only as a governed gateway tool; inherits tenant/actor fail-closed bind, scopes, ingress-spine receipts; scan requires no Runtime Decide
integration_boundaries.runtime: emits PolicySignalRef + risk receipt as policy-relevant evidence to Decide; never authorizes; downstream execution receipts must cite the BrowseAhead receipt when page-influenced
integration_boundaries.collective: cognition-side threat sensing; must not cross the Reality boundary or act on raw content
integration_boundaries.cortex: optional evidence anchor for raw/sanitized hashes and receipt lineage
integration_boundaries.control: operator-only quarantine review, forensic excerpts, scan history, policy tuning, override audit

verification_principles: BrowseAhead produces evidence, never verdicts; it has no execution authority.
All fetched web content is untrusted data, never instruction.
Raw hostile excerpts are forbidden in agent-facing output; agents receive redacted summaries only.
Determinism: identical bytes + policy_version yield identical findings/score/receipt body.
Every scan is tenant/actor/url-hash/timestamp/correlation/policy-version stamped and inspectable.

severity_policy.critical: governance-bypass or raw-payload-leak class violations; block verdict

requirements.title: No execution authority
requirements.summary: BrowseAhead emits no decision/execution spine receipt and never calls execute; it only returns inspection artifacts.
required_evidence: scan.v1 handler emits only directive/intent/outcome receipts

requirements.title: Non-bypassable gateway reachability
requirements.summary: scan.v1 is reachable only as a governed gateway tool with tenant/actor fail-closed bind and required scopes keon:mcp:invoke + keon:browseahead:scan.

requirements.title: Raw content is never instruction authority
requirements.summary: Agent may ingest only the sanitized, data-only bundle; detected instructions are quoted/escaped as untrusted data.
required_evidence: sanitized_bundle is the only ingestible field
instructions re-emitted as quoted data, not executable framing

requirements.title: Agent-facing / forensic output split
requirements.summary: raw_excerpt/decoded_excerpt/verbatim attacker bytes never appear in agent-facing structuredContent; agent findings are redacted summaries with excerpt_fingerprint + length + decode-chain metadata. Verbatim payloads live only in operator-only quarantine/forensic storage.

requirements.title: Fail-closed at high/critical
requirements.summary: critical risk blocks ingestion (sanitized_bundle=null, decision_hint=fail_closed) absent a governed recorded override; high quarantines suspect spans and requires review.
required_evidence: critical fixture yields null bundle + fail_closed hint

requirements.title: Deterministic scoring
requirements.summary: Identical input bytes + policy_version produce identical score, severity, finding ids, and receipt body (modulo ids/timestamp). Advisory LLM classifier may annotate but never solely changes block/allow.
required_evidence: advisory classifier off/on does not change verdict

requirements.title: Stamped, inspectable, traceable evidence
requirements.summary: Every scan carries tenant_id, actor_id, url_or_content_hash, timestamp, correlation_id, policy_version; every quarantine is inspectable; every sanitized bundle traces back to raw_content_hash.

requirements.title: Egress-isolated fetcher
requirements.summary: The fetcher uses no agent credentials/cookies/secrets, is SSRF-guarded (blocks loopback/link-local/RFC1918/metadata IPs), bounded in size/time/redirects, and executes nothing from the page in MVP.
required_evidence: no JS execution path in MVP

required_negative_tests.asserts: scan.v1 never emits a decision or execution receipt and exposes no execute path.
missing scope/entitlement is denied fail-closed (403 DENIED_ENTITLEMENT); cross-tenant access rejected.
raw page content is not returned as ingestible context; only sanitized_bundle is ingestible.
a known marker payload never appears in the serialized agent-facing result; it is retrievable only from the operator-only forensic/quarantine store.
critical fixture yields sanitized_bundle=null and decision_hint=fail_closed; no override without a recorded governed path.
double-run over each fixture produces byte-identical score/finding ids/receipt body; disabling advisory LLM never changes a verdict.
result missing any of the 6 required scan fields fails verification.
fetch targeting loopback/link-local/RFC1918/metadata IP is rejected; no credentials attached.

false_claim_gates.claim: BrowseAhead protects agents from web injection.
false_claim_gates.allowed_only_if: scan returns redacted findings + deterministic score + sanitized data-only bundle + signed receipt under gateway governance
false_claim_gates.false_if: raw page content is returned as ingestible context, OR raw excerpts leak into agent-facing output, OR scoring is non-deterministic

false_claim_gates.allowed_only_if: reachable only as a governed gateway tool with tenant/actor bind, scopes, ingress-spine receipts, and no execute path
false_claim_gates.false_if: any execution authority, side channel to external effect, or unbound/credentialed fetch exists

false_claim_gates.claim: BrowseAhead fails closed on dangerous content.
false_claim_gates.allowed_only_if: critical blocks ingestion with sanitized_bundle=null and fail_closed hint
false_claim_gates.false_if: critical content is returned ingestible without a recorded governed override

required_artifacts: BrowseAhead input/output JSON schemas (inline on the tool definition)

mvp_status.boundary: mode=raw only (deterministic, no render, no execute). mode=url and options.render fail closed (BROWSEAHEAD_URL_FETCH_NOT_ENABLED / BROWSEAHEAD_RENDER_NOT_ENABLED). Isolated fetcher sandbox + rendered-DOM analyzer + advisory-LLM classifier deferred to v0.2.
mvp_status.tests: 19 BrowseAhead tests green (15 engine golden/determinism/redaction + 4 HTTP governance); full gateway unit suite green.
mvp_status.deferred_note: Risk receipt 'signature' is explicitly null in MVP (deterministic 'canonical_sha256' integrity hash present). Detached signing to integrate with the gateway receipt-signing key — design open question #2.

notes_for_verify_canon: Draft pre-canon. Locks to keon_browseahead_canon_v1_locked.json after MVP lands and the redaction-leak + determinism tests are green in CI. Until locked, BA-004 (output split) is the gating correction required before implementation per operator directive 2026-06-21.
